TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O nengneng to ilisin - 1 == Patodong to no "mihecaan a lisin" a ilisin, o piahowid to kawas a sapahapinang. O hafay ko nikaenan no 'Amis finacadan iti:ya ho, orasaka paloma to hafay ira ko kasaira no lisin ato paysin hananay. saka to mihecahacaan a kasalisin ato demak maledefay i pipalomaan to hafay. O ilisin saheto itiniay i saka 7, 8 foladan ko pidemak, halo pipalomaan to hafay, pikolasan, pipatooran paloma, pitapahan lisin, paka'oradan ato pakacidalan, pilitodan, pawalian, pacomodan i 'ariri a rayray to salepon itiya a midemak to ilisin. Pakayni i pipacomodan i 'ariri, ato pala'edan to saka tosa rekad pipalomaan a midemak to ilisin, todong paherekan no mihecaan ato satapang no fa'elohay pitekaan o sanay. Anini sato caay to pipaloma to hafay ko 'Amis a finacadan, nika ira ho ko pidemak to ilisin. Onini ko nihaenan to kasasiromaan no ponka, nika o todong no demak caay ka sasiroma. Ira ko tosaay a kimad no 'Amis a finacadan, o pahapinang to pakayraan no ilisin, saka cecay a kimad i masowal ko itiyaay ho a demak, ira ko kakedalan, samihecahecaan sa malowan ko nilitodan to hafay, pakalitemoh to ko finawlan to kacango'ot to saka'orip, nanoya pasikakarayan i kawas ko finawlan milongoc to pipaka'orad a lisin. So'elinay matengilay no kawas ko pilongoc no finawlan, matefad to 'orad, macepa' to ko sera. nanoya miahowid ko finawlan to palemed no kawas saka, tefad sa to polong no tayal, mifoting ko fa'inayan, mirahekad ko fafahiyan to kakaenen, ta midemak to ilisin, o ninianan ko todong piahowid to pafeli no kawas ato kadofah no pilitod. Saka tosa a kimad i, pakayniay to "Alikakay a kimad". Onini a kimad masowal aca itini i Cikasoan, sacisowal sa kina kimad: iti:ya ho i, talifahal sa ira ko masafelaway takaeraway ko tireng a tamdaw, sacisowal sa o "Alikakay" han a takaraway tamdaw, pahicera sa i lotok no Parik(Milon). O nga'ayay ko pi'orip to romi'ami'ad, nika o na tayni cangra o Alikakay itiya, ona caayay ka citatiihay demak ko 'Amis finacadan itiya i, tokitok sa cidemak to tatiihay. Tinako malahedaw ko wawa, matamatama to i awaay to malitina'i. misamsam to fafahiyan ko fa'inay, masasiwatid ko pinangan no fa'inayan, talifahal sa makilasangan a mafola ko demak. Ikor sato masapinang to no finawlan o "Alikakay" a nidemakan koni sato, orasaka o kakitaan no niyaro' ci Marang, mikomod to kakitaan no kasaniyaro' ato mato'asay a masasowasowal to pakayniay tatiihay demak no niyaro', mico'ay to Alikakay, masasiiked nai katimol ka'amis milafa' to lotok no Parik(Milon). Nika samaamaanen ko pilood, hato caay ka lowed koya takaraway tamdaw. Ira ko cecay romi'ad tayra ci Marang i lilis no riyar a mapades ko harateng, maroray to ko rakat saka foti' sato i riyar. I kafoti'an talalemed to kawas no riyar, pasowal sa i cingraan: "Wawaaw ako, caay ko tamdaw ko Alikakay, samaamaanen nomo ko demak caay ko mamalowid, dengan o piporong namo to talod ta pakaco'ay kamo, nanay malaheci namo koni." maherek pasowal malasawad to. So'elinay doedo sato cangra to pipa'ayaw no kawas no riyar, milaha ko kakitaan to "Porong", ala mikitosotosor koya Alikakay milongoc to pipalafac cangraan, manengneng no kakitaan konini a demak i, tefad hanto koya "Porong", pasiAlikakay a pasowal: "Olili kamo, aka to piliyaw a tayni." Nanoyaan sato, awaay to manengneng ko Alikakay miliyaw a tayni, o caay to kaciliyaw ko tatiihay demak i niyaro' no 'Amis a finacadan. O pahecian ato kacitodongan no "Ilisin" Pakayni to nisowalan kimad no Alikakay i, masapinang ko tatodong no ilisin o piahowid to palemed ato kasini'ada no kawas, nawhani cira ko sakapiliyas to kafadesan, mangalef o mamatekop ko finawlan nasa i, ira aca ko pakayraan a miliyas. Masapinangay ko "Pipa'orip". O tato'asan no 'Amis masamsam maepec no "palafoay", talacowa misa'icel to, pakayni to masamaanay to sapico'ay, makinafalah to ko 'orip, ha:to caay pakalowid to masatatiihay. Dengan o piti'er to adayay no kawas, pafeli to pa'arawan, sakaira no pakayraan a sapilifet, ta malowid to ko tatiihay, itiya to pakaliyas ko tamdaw to kafadesan, sakaira no pakoniraay. O ninianan ko pahecian ato kacitodongan no "Ilisin" hananay. Caayto pipaloma kita to hafay, nika padoedo midemak to ilisin. Tayni to kita i maci, caayto kamaomah, awaayto ko pilitod, caay katongal ko kinaira, nika mileko aca kita to ilisin, nawhani ano itinitini kita i tatiihay a ka'oripan padoedo midipot titaanan ko kawas, o pipahapinang no mita to piahowid to kawas koni. Painiay ci Cilo singsi (2018/8/1) Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == o~u nəŋnəŋ to~u iɾisin - * == pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u no~u "miħəʦaan a ɾisin" a iɾisin, o~u piaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u kawas a sapaħapinaŋ. o~u ħafaj ko~u nikaənan no~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan iti:ja ħo~u, o~urasaka paɾo~uma to~u ħafaj ira ko~u kasaira no~u ɾisin ato~u pajsin ħananaj. saka to~u miħəʦaħaʦaan a kasaɾisin ato~u ɬ~ɮəmak maɾəɬ~ɮəfaj i pipaɾo~umaan to~u ħafaj. o~u iɾisin saħəto~u itiniaj i saka *, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak, ħaɾo~u pipaɾo~umaan to~u ħafaj, piko~uɾasan, pipato~uo~uran paɾo~uma, pitapaħan ɾisin, pakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮan ato~u pakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾan, piɾito~uɬ~ɮan, pawaɾian, paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮan i ʡariri a rajraj to~u saɾəpo~un itija a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin. pakajni i pipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮan i ʡariri, ato~u paɾaʡəɬ~ɮan to~u saka to~usa rəkaɬ~ɮ pipaɾo~umaan a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ paħərəkan no~u miħəʦaan ato~u satapaŋ no~u faʡəɾo~uħaj pitəkaan o~u sanaj. anini sato~u ʦaaj to~u pipaɾo~uma to~u ħafaj ko~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nika ira ħo~u ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin. o~unini ko~u niħaənan to~u kasasiro~umaan no~u po~unka, nika o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak ʦaaj ka sasiro~uma. ira ko~u to~usaaj a kimaɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~u paħapinaŋ to~u pakajraan no~u iɾisin, saka ʦəʦaj a kimaɬ~ɮ i maso~uwaɾ ko~u itijaaj ħo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak, ira ko~u kakəɬ~ɮaɾan, samiħəʦaħəʦaan sa maɾo~uwan ko~u niɾito~uɬ~ɮan to~u ħafaj, pakaɾitəmo~uħ to~u ko~u finawɾan to~u kaʦaŋo~uʡo~ut to~u sakaʡo~urip, nano~uja pasikakarajan i kawas ko~u finawɾan miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u pipakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ a ɾisin. so~uʡəɾinaj matəŋiɾaj no~u kawas ko~u piɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u finawɾan, matəfaɬ~ɮ to~u ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ, maʦəpaʡ to~u ko~u səra. nano~uja miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u finawɾan to~u paɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas saka, təfaɬ~ɮ sa to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajaɾ, mifo~utiŋ ko~u faʡinajan, miraħəkaɬ~ɮ ko~u fafaħijan to~u kakaənən, ta miɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin, o~u ninianan ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u pafəɾi no~u kawas ato~u kaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ no~u piɾito~uɬ~ɮ. saka to~usa a kimaɬ~ɮ i, pakajniaj to~u "aɾikakaj a kimaɬ~ɮ". o~unini a kimaɬ~ɮ maso~uwaɾ aʦa itini i ʦikaso~uan, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa kina kimaɬ~ɮ: iti:ja ħo~u i, taɾifaħaɾ sa ira ko~u masafəɾawaj takaərawaj ko~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa o~u "aɾikakaj" ħan a takarawaj tamɬ~ɮaw, paħiʦəra sa i ɾo~uto~uk no~u parik(miɾo~un). o~u ŋaʡajaj ko~u piʡo~urip to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ, nika o~u na tajni ʦaŋra o~u aɾikakaj itija, o~una ʦaajaj ka ʦitatiiħaj ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan itija i, to~ukito~uk sa ʦiɬ~ɮəmak to~u tatiiħaj. tinako~u maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u wawa, matamatama to~u i awaaj to~u maɾitinaʡi. misamsam to~u fafaħijan ko~u faʡinaj, masasiwatiɬ~ɮ ko~u pinaŋan no~u faʡinajan, taɾifaħaɾ sa makiɾasaŋan a mafo~uɾa ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak. iko~ur sato~u masapinaŋ to~u no~u finawɾan o~u "aɾikakaj" a niɬ~ɮəmakan ko~uni sato~u, o~urasaka o~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~uʡ ʦi maraŋ, miko~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kakitaan no~u kasanijaro~uʡ ato~u mato~uʡasaj a masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u pakajniaj tatiiħaj ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaro~uʡ, miʦo~uʡaj to~u aɾikakaj, masasiikəɬ~ɮ nai katimo~uɾ kaʡamis miɾafaʡ to~u ɾo~uto~uk no~u parik(miɾo~un). nika samaamaanən ko~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, ħato~u ʦaaj ka ɾo~uwəɬ~ɮ ko~uja takarawaj tamɬ~ɮaw. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ tajra ʦi maraŋ i ɾiɾis no~u rijar a mapaɬ~ɮəs ko~u ħaratəŋ, maro~uraj to~u ko~u rakat saka fo~utiʡ sato~u i rijar. i kafo~utiʡan taɾaɾəməɬ~ɮ to~u kawas no~u rijar, paso~uwaɾ sa i ʦiŋraan: "wawaaw ako~u, ʦaaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u aɾikakaj, samaamaanən no~umo~u ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ʦaaj ko~u mamaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u pipo~uro~uŋ namo~u to~u taɾo~uɬ~ɮ ta pakaʦo~uʡaj kamo~u, nanaj maɾaħəʦi namo~u ko~uni." maħərək paso~uwaɾ maɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u. so~uʡəɾinaj ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sato~u ʦaŋra to~u pipaʡajaw no~u kawas no~u rijar, miɾaħa ko~u kakitaan to~u "po~uro~uŋ", aɾa mikito~uso~uto~uso~ur ko~uja aɾikakaj miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u pipaɾafaʦ ʦaŋraan, manəŋnəŋ no~u kakitaan ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak i, təfaɬ~ɮ ħanto~u ko~uja "po~uro~uŋ", pasiaɾikakaj a paso~uwaɾ: "o~uɾiɾi kamo~u, aka to~u piɾijaw a tajni." nano~ujaan sato~u, awaaj to~u manəŋnəŋ ko~u aɾikakaj miɾijaw a tajni, o~u ʦaaj to~u kaʦiɾijaw ko~u tatiiħaj ɬ~ɮəmak i nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. o~u paħəʦian ato~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u "iɾisin" pakajni to~u niso~uwaɾan kimaɬ~ɮ no~u aɾikakaj i, masapinaŋ ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u iɾisin o~u piaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u paɾəməɬ~ɮ ato~u kasiniʡaɬ~ɮa no~u kawas, nawħani ʦira ko~u sakapiɾijas to~u kafaɬ~ɮəsan, maŋaɾəf o~u mamatəko~up ko~u finawɾan nasa i, ira aʦa ko~u pakajraan a miɾijas. masapinaŋaj ko~u "pipaʡo~urip". o~u tato~uʡasan no~u ʡamis masamsam maəpəʦ no~u "paɾafo~uaj", taɾaʦo~uwa misaʡiʦəɾ to~u, pakajni to~u masamaanaj to~u sapiʦo~uʡaj, makinafaɾaħ to~u ko~u ʡo~urip, ħa:to~u ʦaaj pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u masatatiiħaj. ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u pitiʡər to~u aɬ~ɮajaj no~u kawas, pafəɾi to~u paʡarawan, sakaira no~u pakajraan a sapiɾifət, ta maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u tatiiħaj, itija to~u pakaɾijas ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kafaɬ~ɮəsan, sakaira no~u pako~uniraaj. o~u ninianan ko~u paħəʦian ato~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u "iɾisin" ħananaj. ʦaajto~u pipaɾo~uma kita to~u ħafaj, nika paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u miɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin. tajni to~u kita i maʦi, ʦaajto~u kamao~umaħ, awaajto~u ko~u piɾito~uɬ~ɮ, ʦaaj kato~uŋaɾ ko~u kinaira, nika miɾəko~u aʦa kita to~u iɾisin, nawħani ano~u itinitini kita i tatiiħaj a kaʡo~uripan paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u miɬ~ɮipo~ut titaanan ko~u kawas, o~u pipaħapinaŋ no~u mita to~u piaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u kawas ko~uni. painiaj ʦi ʦiɾo~u siŋsi (****/*/*) mifaɾiʦaj ʦi masao~u nikar
S.FORM: == O nengneng to ilisin - 1 == Patodong to no "mihecaan a lisin" a ilisin, o piahowid to kawas a sapahapinang. O hafay ko nikaenan no 'Amis finacadan iti:ya ho, orasaka paloma to hafay ira ko kasaira no lisin ato paysin hananay. saka to mihecahacaan a kasalisin ato demak maledefay i pipalomaan to hafay. O ilisin saheto itiniay i saka 7, 8 foladan ko pidemak, halo pipalomaan to hafay, pikolasan, pipatooran paloma, pitapahan lisin, paka'oradan ato pakacidalan, pilitodan, pawalian, pacomodan i 'ariri a rayray to salepon itiya a midemak to ilisin. Pakayni i pipacomodan i 'ariri, ato pala'edan to saka tosa rekad pipalomaan a midemak to ilisin, todong paherekan no mihecaan ato satapang no fa'elohay pitekaan o sanay. Anini sato caay to pipaloma to hafay ko 'Amis a finacadan, nika ira ho ko pidemak to ilisin. Onini ko nihaenan to kasasiromaan no ponka, nika o todong no demak caay ka sasiroma. Ira ko tosaay a kimad no 'Amis a finacadan, o pahapinang to pakayraan no ilisin, saka cecay a kimad i masowal ko itiyaay ho a demak, ira ko kakedalan, samihecahecaan sa malowan ko nilitodan to hafay, pakalitemoh to ko finawlan to kacango'ot to saka'orip, nanoya pasikakarayan i kawas ko finawlan milongoc to pipaka'orad a lisin. So'elinay matengilay no kawas ko pilongoc no finawlan, matefad to 'orad, macepa' to ko sera. nanoya miahowid ko finawlan to palemed no kawas saka, tefad sa to polong no tayal, mifoting ko fa'inayan, mirahekad ko fafahiyan to kakaenen, ta midemak to ilisin, o ninianan ko todong piahowid to pafeli no kawas ato kadofah no pilitod. Saka tosa a kimad i, pakayniay to "Alikakay a kimad". Onini a kimad masowal aca itini i Cikasoan, sacisowal sa kina kimad: iti:ya ho i, talifahal sa ira ko masafelaway takaeraway ko tireng a tamdaw, sacisowal sa o "Alikakay" han a takaraway tamdaw, pahicera sa i lotok no Parik(Milon). O nga'ayay ko pi'orip to romi'ami'ad, nika o na tayni cangra o Alikakay itiya, ona caayay ka citatiihay demak ko 'Amis finacadan itiya i, tokitok sa cidemak to tatiihay. Tinako malahedaw ko wawa, matamatama to i awaay to malitina'i. misamsam to fafahiyan ko fa'inay, masasiwatid ko pinangan no fa'inayan, talifahal sa makilasangan a mafola ko demak. Ikor sato masapinang to no finawlan o "Alikakay" a nidemakan koni sato, orasaka o kakitaan no niyaro' ci Marang, mikomod to kakitaan no kasaniyaro' ato mato'asay a masasowasowal to pakayniay tatiihay demak no niyaro', mico'ay to Alikakay, masasiiked nai katimol ka'amis milafa' to lotok no Parik(Milon). Nika samaamaanen ko pilood, hato caay ka lowed koya takaraway tamdaw. Ira ko cecay romi'ad tayra ci Marang i lilis no riyar a mapades ko harateng, maroray to ko rakat saka foti' sato i riyar. I kafoti'an talalemed to kawas no riyar, pasowal sa i cingraan: "Wawaaw ako, caay ko tamdaw ko Alikakay, samaamaanen nomo ko demak caay ko mamalowid, dengan o piporong namo to talod ta pakaco'ay kamo, nanay malaheci namo koni." maherek pasowal malasawad to. So'elinay doedo sato cangra to pipa'ayaw no kawas no riyar, milaha ko kakitaan to "Porong", ala mikitosotosor koya Alikakay milongoc to pipalafac cangraan, manengneng no kakitaan konini a demak i, tefad hanto koya "Porong", pasiAlikakay a pasowal: "Olili kamo, aka to piliyaw a tayni." Nanoyaan sato, awaay to manengneng ko Alikakay miliyaw a tayni, o caay to kaciliyaw ko tatiihay demak i niyaro' no 'Amis a finacadan. O pahecian ato kacitodongan no "Ilisin" Pakayni to nisowalan kimad no Alikakay i, masapinang ko tatodong no ilisin o piahowid to palemed ato kasini'ada no kawas, nawhani cira ko sakapiliyas to kafadesan, mangalef o mamatekop ko finawlan nasa i, ira aca ko pakayraan a miliyas. Masapinangay ko "Pipa'orip". O tato'asan no 'Amis masamsam maepec no "palafoay", talacowa misa'icel to, pakayni to masamaanay to sapico'ay, makinafalah to ko 'orip, ha:to caay pakalowid to masatatiihay. Dengan o piti'er to adayay no kawas, pafeli to pa'arawan, sakaira no pakayraan a sapilifet, ta malowid to ko tatiihay, itiya to pakaliyas ko tamdaw to kafadesan, sakaira no pakoniraay. O ninianan ko pahecian ato kacitodongan no "Ilisin" hananay. Caayto pipaloma kita to hafay, nika padoedo midemak to ilisin. Tayni to kita i maci, caayto kamaomah, awaayto ko pilitod, caay katongal ko kinaira, nika mileko aca kita to ilisin, nawhani ano itinitini kita i tatiihay a ka'oripan padoedo midipot titaanan ko kawas, o pipahapinang no mita to piahowid to kawas koni. Painiay ci Cilo singsi (2018/8/1) Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == o~u nəŋnəŋ to~u iɾisin - * == pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u no~u "miħəʦaan a ɾisin" a iɾisin, o~u piaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u kawas a sapaħapinaŋ. o~u ħafaj ko~u nikaənan no~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan iti:ja ħo~u, o~urasaka paɾo~uma to~u ħafaj ira ko~u kasaira no~u ɾisin ato~u pajsin ħananaj. saka to~u miħəʦaħaʦaan a kasaɾisin ato~u ɬ~ɮəmak maɾəɬ~ɮəfaj i pipaɾo~umaan to~u ħafaj. o~u iɾisin saħəto~u itiniaj i saka *, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak, ħaɾo~u pipaɾo~umaan to~u ħafaj, piko~uɾasan, pipato~uo~uran paɾo~uma, pitapaħan ɾisin, pakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮan ato~u pakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾan, piɾito~uɬ~ɮan, pawaɾian, paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮan i ʡariri a rajraj to~u saɾəpo~un itija a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin. pakajni i pipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮan i ʡariri, ato~u paɾaʡəɬ~ɮan to~u saka to~usa rəkaɬ~ɮ pipaɾo~umaan a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ paħərəkan no~u miħəʦaan ato~u satapaŋ no~u faʡəɾo~uħaj pitəkaan o~u sanaj. anini sato~u ʦaaj to~u pipaɾo~uma to~u ħafaj ko~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nika ira ħo~u ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin. o~unini ko~u niħaənan to~u kasasiro~umaan no~u po~unka, nika o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak ʦaaj ka sasiro~uma. ira ko~u to~usaaj a kimaɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~u paħapinaŋ to~u pakajraan no~u iɾisin, saka ʦəʦaj a kimaɬ~ɮ i maso~uwaɾ ko~u itijaaj ħo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak, ira ko~u kakəɬ~ɮaɾan, samiħəʦaħəʦaan sa maɾo~uwan ko~u niɾito~uɬ~ɮan to~u ħafaj, pakaɾitəmo~uħ to~u ko~u finawɾan to~u kaʦaŋo~uʡo~ut to~u sakaʡo~urip, nano~uja pasikakarajan i kawas ko~u finawɾan miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u pipakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ a ɾisin. so~uʡəɾinaj matəŋiɾaj no~u kawas ko~u piɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u finawɾan, matəfaɬ~ɮ to~u ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ, maʦəpaʡ to~u ko~u səra. nano~uja miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u finawɾan to~u paɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas saka, təfaɬ~ɮ sa to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajaɾ, mifo~utiŋ ko~u faʡinajan, miraħəkaɬ~ɮ ko~u fafaħijan to~u kakaənən, ta miɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin, o~u ninianan ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u pafəɾi no~u kawas ato~u kaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ no~u piɾito~uɬ~ɮ. saka to~usa a kimaɬ~ɮ i, pakajniaj to~u "aɾikakaj a kimaɬ~ɮ". o~unini a kimaɬ~ɮ maso~uwaɾ aʦa itini i ʦikaso~uan, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa kina kimaɬ~ɮ: iti:ja ħo~u i, taɾifaħaɾ sa ira ko~u masafəɾawaj takaərawaj ko~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa o~u "aɾikakaj" ħan a takarawaj tamɬ~ɮaw, paħiʦəra sa i ɾo~uto~uk no~u parik(miɾo~un). o~u ŋaʡajaj ko~u piʡo~urip to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ, nika o~u na tajni ʦaŋra o~u aɾikakaj itija, o~una ʦaajaj ka ʦitatiiħaj ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan itija i, to~ukito~uk sa ʦiɬ~ɮəmak to~u tatiiħaj. tinako~u maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u wawa, matamatama to~u i awaaj to~u maɾitinaʡi. misamsam to~u fafaħijan ko~u faʡinaj, masasiwatiɬ~ɮ ko~u pinaŋan no~u faʡinajan, taɾifaħaɾ sa makiɾasaŋan a mafo~uɾa ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak. iko~ur sato~u masapinaŋ to~u no~u finawɾan o~u "aɾikakaj" a niɬ~ɮəmakan ko~uni sato~u, o~urasaka o~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~uʡ ʦi maraŋ, miko~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kakitaan no~u kasanijaro~uʡ ato~u mato~uʡasaj a masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u pakajniaj tatiiħaj ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaro~uʡ, miʦo~uʡaj to~u aɾikakaj, masasiikəɬ~ɮ nai katimo~uɾ kaʡamis miɾafaʡ to~u ɾo~uto~uk no~u parik(miɾo~un). nika samaamaanən ko~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, ħato~u ʦaaj ka ɾo~uwəɬ~ɮ ko~uja takarawaj tamɬ~ɮaw. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ tajra ʦi maraŋ i ɾiɾis no~u rijar a mapaɬ~ɮəs ko~u ħaratəŋ, maro~uraj to~u ko~u rakat saka fo~utiʡ sato~u i rijar. i kafo~utiʡan taɾaɾəməɬ~ɮ to~u kawas no~u rijar, paso~uwaɾ sa i ʦiŋraan: "wawaaw ako~u, ʦaaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u aɾikakaj, samaamaanən no~umo~u ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ʦaaj ko~u mamaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u pipo~uro~uŋ namo~u to~u taɾo~uɬ~ɮ ta pakaʦo~uʡaj kamo~u, nanaj maɾaħəʦi namo~u ko~uni." maħərək paso~uwaɾ maɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u. so~uʡəɾinaj ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sato~u ʦaŋra to~u pipaʡajaw no~u kawas no~u rijar, miɾaħa ko~u kakitaan to~u "po~uro~uŋ", aɾa mikito~uso~uto~uso~ur ko~uja aɾikakaj miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u pipaɾafaʦ ʦaŋraan, manəŋnəŋ no~u kakitaan ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak i, təfaɬ~ɮ ħanto~u ko~uja "po~uro~uŋ", pasiaɾikakaj a paso~uwaɾ: "o~uɾiɾi kamo~u, aka to~u piɾijaw a tajni." nano~ujaan sato~u, awaaj to~u manəŋnəŋ ko~u aɾikakaj miɾijaw a tajni, o~u ʦaaj to~u kaʦiɾijaw ko~u tatiiħaj ɬ~ɮəmak i nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. o~u paħəʦian ato~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u "iɾisin" pakajni to~u niso~uwaɾan kimaɬ~ɮ no~u aɾikakaj i, masapinaŋ ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u iɾisin o~u piaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u paɾəməɬ~ɮ ato~u kasiniʡaɬ~ɮa no~u kawas, nawħani ʦira ko~u sakapiɾijas to~u kafaɬ~ɮəsan, maŋaɾəf o~u mamatəko~up ko~u finawɾan nasa i, ira aʦa ko~u pakajraan a miɾijas. masapinaŋaj ko~u "pipaʡo~urip". o~u tato~uʡasan no~u ʡamis masamsam maəpəʦ no~u "paɾafo~uaj", taɾaʦo~uwa misaʡiʦəɾ to~u, pakajni to~u masamaanaj to~u sapiʦo~uʡaj, makinafaɾaħ to~u ko~u ʡo~urip, ħa:to~u ʦaaj pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u masatatiiħaj. ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u pitiʡər to~u aɬ~ɮajaj no~u kawas, pafəɾi to~u paʡarawan, sakaira no~u pakajraan a sapiɾifət, ta maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u tatiiħaj, itija to~u pakaɾijas ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kafaɬ~ɮəsan, sakaira no~u pako~uniraaj. o~u ninianan ko~u paħəʦian ato~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u "iɾisin" ħananaj. ʦaajto~u pipaɾo~uma kita to~u ħafaj, nika paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u miɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin. tajni to~u kita i maʦi, ʦaajto~u kamao~umaħ, awaajto~u ko~u piɾito~uɬ~ɮ, ʦaaj kato~uŋaɾ ko~u kinaira, nika miɾəko~u aʦa kita to~u iɾisin, nawħani ano~u itinitini kita i tatiiħaj a kaʡo~uripan paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u miɬ~ɮipo~ut titaanan ko~u kawas, o~u pipaħapinaŋ no~u mita to~u piaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u kawas ko~uni. painiaj ʦi ʦiɾo~u siŋsi (****/*/*) mifaɾiʦaj ʦi masao~u nikar
